common.tagline: Find your best party match for the 2026 Dutch municipal elections

home.title: Which municipality do you vote in?
home.subtitle: Search for your municipality to start the questionnaire

questionnaire.title: Questionnaire
questionnaire.partiesAgreeDesc: These parties agree with this statement
questionnaire.partiesDisagreeDesc: These parties disagree with this statement
questionnaire.partiesNeitherDesc: These parties neither agree nor disagree

compass.title: Political Compass
compass.description: Your position (blue) compared to parties (gray) based on your answers.

tuning.title: Tune your results
tuning.description: Tap a topic to increase its weight. Important topics count more in your results.

explore.title: Explore All Municipalities
explore.subtitle: Data from {count} Dutch municipalities
explore.showing: Showing {shown} of {total}. Search to find more.
explore.funFactEnglish: Only {count} municipalities offer an official English version
explore.funFactMaxStatements: {count} municipalities use the maximum of 30 statements
explore.funFactUniqueParties: {count} unique parties compete across all municipalities
explore.funFactIncumbency: On average, {pct}% of parties per municipality are incumbents
explore.funFactDivisive: "{theme}" is the most divisive topic, with a {agreePct}-{disagreePct} agree/disagree split
explore.funFactFenceSitter: {party} in {municipality} is the most neutral, choosing 'neither' on {pct}% of statements
explore.funFactNeverNeutral: {count} parties across all municipalities never chose 'neither'
explore.funFactTwins: In {municipality}, {partyA} and {partyB} agree on {pct}% of statements
explore.funFactHarmonious: Parties in {name} agree the most, averaging {pct}% agreement
explore.funFactDivided: Parties in {name} disagree the most, averaging only {pct}% agreement
explore.funFactTopPartyMissing: {party} is in {count} of 258 municipalities, but missing in {missingCount}
explore.funFactLocalParties: {count} of {total} parties are local, appearing in only one municipality
explore.funFactWordiest: {party} in {municipality} writes the longest explanations, averaging {count} words
explore.funFactMostThemes: {name} covers {count} different topics, the most of any municipality

share.title: Share Your Results
share.chooseFormat: Download an image for your preferred platform:

flow.speedWarning: You went through the questionnaire too fast.
flow.speedWarningDesc: You'll get better results if you take your time for each statement. Go back and review your answers.
flow.importantTopics: Are there topics you find extra important?
flow.importantTopicsDesc: Select up to 3 topics that matter most to you. These will count extra in your results.
flow.partyFilter: Which parties do you want to include in the result?
flow.partyFilterDesc: Choose all parties, only incumbent parties, or make your own selection. Select at least 3.
flow.tieBreaker: The top parties are very close to each other.
flow.tieBreakerDesc: With extra questions you can see which party best matches your opinion.
flow.resultSubtitle: Click on a party to compare your opinion
flow.shootoutResult: You chose {count} of {total} statements for the position of {party}.

footer.disclaimer: Independent project, not affiliated with ProDemos or StemWijzer. We do not store any personal data.
